entry.title: [Bountiful Crescendo] Limited-Time Material Double Drop Event
entry.content:
The Sonoro Spheres are undergoing an accelerating collapse due to the Waveworn Phenomenon. However, this is also intensifying the energy within, resulting in more valuable materials.

Use the Waveplates to maximize your rewards from the Remnant Crystals.

Duration

2026-04-02 04:00 - 2026-04-09 03:59 (server time)

Eligibility

Reach Union Level 14.

Details

  • Complete Simulation Challenge and Forgery Challenges during the event and spend Waveplates for double rewards.

  • Simulation Challenge and Forgery Challenge share the double rewards claims.

  • During [Bountiful Crescendo], you can claim double rewards 3 times a day, and the remaining double rewards claims can be viewed on the [Bountiful Crescendo] event page.

  • During [Bountiful Crescendo], double rewards claims refresh daily at 04:00 (server time).

entry.title: [Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project!] Leisure Event
entry.content:
At this year's Club Show & Tell, Van Tassie of the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society proudly unveils his latest project: the ""F.U.E.L. Optimization Simulator."" He claims this game will revolutionize the Academy's culinary experience by gathering the essential data. As is par for the course, your name is on the playtest roster. Yet, something about the project's core design seems... slightly off from the outset.

Duration

2026-04-02 04:00 - 2026-04-20 03:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x400, Forgery Advanced Supply - Lahai-Roi x14, Advanced Enclosure Tank - Lahai-Roi x28, Advanced Resonance Potion x20, Advanced Energy Core x20, Advanced Sealed Tube x16, Shell Credit x280000

Eligibility

Reach Union Level 14 and activate the Resonance Nexus in Startorch Academy during Main Quest Chapter III Act I ""What Burns Beneath Frostlands"" to unlock.

(For the best experience, please complete this event's preceding quest ""Gold Suspended in Shadows."")

Event Rules

  • Access the event from the Mind Dive Arcade machine or the Event Page. Control your Resonator to move left and right to catch falling food and earn Gourmet Points.

  • Catch food to build Energy. Once your Energy bar is full, you can activate a powerful Resonator Skill. Be careful—catching certain negative foods will drain your Energy and slow you down.

  • Reach the target Gourmet Points to earn 1 Star to clear the stage. Quitting the game midway will finalize this stage based on the Gourmet Points earned.

  • Stage 1 is available when the event begins. A new stage unlocks each following day, each featuring a new Resonator with unique skills.

  • Any unclaimed rewards will be sent to your in-game mailbox automatically if you log in within 30 days after the event ends.

entry.title: V3.2 Wuthering Waves Battle Rush
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

The Wuthering Waves Battle Rush is now live! Record and share your most exciting battle moments with the hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle on X (Twitter)/YouTube Shorts/TikTok to compete for a reward of Astrite x2,000 and a chance to get featured on our social media with direct credits! Other than these rewards, 10 extra winners will be selected to receive a $50 Amazon Gift Card.

Showcase your outstanding battle tactics in a condensed clip and share them with us!

Content Requirement

Create your own combat video featuring Wuthering Waves.

We require no limits to the characters, level, or scenes. All entries that feature your combat in Wuthering Waves are qualified to join the event and compete for rewards!

How to Submit

Post your work on X (Twitter)/YouTube Shorts/TikTok with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle included publicly.

Submission Period

2026/03/19 - 2025/04/16 (PT)

Judging Criteria

All eligible works will undergo evaluation based on their adherence to the theme, degree of completion, reception among players, and other relevant factors.

Notes

To qualify for participation, you should include both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle in your post.

Deleted posts will not be qualified for entitlement of rewards.

You can submit multiple entries. However, the same work published on different platforms will not count towards the rewards.

Entries listed below may be excluded from the judging process:

  • Works not created in accordance with Wuthering Waves

  • Works found to contain plagiarism or infringement of intellectual property rights

  • Works submitted outside the event period

  • Works created with the assistance of AI technology

  • Works featuring extremely aggressive content, including but not limited to themes of pornography, violence, politics, or racism

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows" is now live!
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows" is now live! Post your work with hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook and fill out the form for a chance to win iPhone 17 Pro 512GB, Astrites and more!

Create your works of boundless imagination to present the world of Wuthering Waves!

Proceed to submit:

<https://forms.gle/ScWFdWdroKDrtnqV7>

Content Requirement

Create your own artwork about Wuthering Waves Version 3.2 "Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows"!

Whether it's an illustration of your beloved character, comical moments from your adventures, or difficult combos you've mastered—anything that aligns with the theme is eligible for submission. Share your artwork or video for a chance to win exciting prizes!

How to Submit

  1. Post your artwork on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart included.

  2. Complete the submission form with your submission details. Once done, your submission will be considered successful.

  • Please quote your post link with the right hashtags published publicly on the designated platforms.

Submission form:

<https://forms.gle/ScWFdWdroKDrtnqV7>

Submission Period

2026/03/19 - 2026/04/20 (PT)

Rewards

1st Place (5 Winners): iPhone 17 Pro 512GB

2nd Place (5 Winners): 6,000 Astrites & 800 USD

3rd Place (10 Winners): 3,000 Astrites & 400 USD

4th Place (15 Winners): 2,000 Astrites & 200 USD

5th Place (20 Winners): 1,000 Astrites & Official Merchandise

Lucky Prize (20 Winners): $20 Amazon Gift Card

Judging Criteria

All eligible works will undergo evaluation based on their adherence to the theme, degree of completion, reception among players, and other relevant factors.

Notes

  1. To qualify for participation, you should include both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart in your post and fill out the submission form.

  2. Deleted posts will not be qualified for entitlement of rewards.

  3. You can submit multiple entries and win multiple rewards. However, the same work published on different platforms will not count towards the rewards.

  4. Entries listed below may be excluded from the judging process:

  • Works not created in accordance with Wuthering Waves

  • Works found to contain plagiarism or infringement of intellectual property rights

  • Works submitted outside the event period

  • Works created with the assistance of AI technology

  • Works featuring extremely aggressive content, including but not limited to themes of pornography, violence, politics, or racism

  • Works that have already been used for commercial purposes

  • Works previously entered into other fan creation events

  • Works deemed inappropriate by the judges

  1. Failure to reply to the official staff within 7 days from the date of notification will be considered a waiver of entitlement to the rewards.

  2. This event is open to submissions from all languages, as creators proficient in any language are eligible to compete for rewards. Entries differing only in language will be treated as equivalent works.

  3. By participating in the event, you grant KURO GAMES the right to freely republish your submitted content on the internet and social media platforms, with appropriate credit given to the creator. No additional notice will be provided prior to publication.

  4. This event is available solely to participants on the designated servers listed below: America, Europe, Asia, SEA, HMT(HK,MO,TW).

entry.title: Patch Notes for Version 3.2: Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Thank you for your continued support. The following is a summary of content that will become available in Version 3.2: Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]

✦Maintenance Time: 2026-03-19 04:00 - 2026-03-19 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-03-19 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.

✦Bug Fixes Compensation: Astrite x300

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-03-19 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

[Version Update Details]

New Resonator

5-Star Resonator: Sigrika (Aero/Gauntlets)

Sigrika, a student of Startorch Academy and a Resonator of Royan Runes.

Determined to live up to others' expectations and become a true Solsworn, she devotes herself fully to every challenge.

Combat Roles: Main Damage Dealer, Traction, Echo Skill DMG

Obtainable through the [When the Runes Glitter] Featured Resonator Convene.

New Weapon

5-Star Weapon: Solsworn Ciphers (Gauntlets)

Sunlight gathers. The answer is made plain. What must be done awaits. The Rein is in your hand. Step forward, toward the sunlit end.

Obtainable through the [Solsworn Ciphers] Featured Weapon Convene.

New Enemies

Phagosite: Bipolarch, Phagosite: Hysterarch, Phagosite: Miserarch, Fractsidus Milliner, Fractsidus Mawdoll, Fractsidus Ripper

New Stories

[Main Quest] Chapter III Act IV: Gold Suspended in Shadows

Amidst the festive atmosphere of Startorch Academy's New Solar Celebration, President Lucilla detects a mysterious frequency appearing in the Academy's Dark Side—one that does not belong to the Academy. You suspect it may be the "reward" once mentioned by the Grand Architect of the Fractsidus. Determined to uncover the truth behind this anomaly, you venture into the Dark Side alongside Sigrika, a student you encountered there...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.2 update.

  • Eligibility: Complete Segue: Afterstory "All That Sunlight Touches" to unlock.

[Segue: Afterstory] Rabbit Reflected in Shades

After the New Solar Celebration comes to an end, Lucilla sends you a WavesLine message, saying that the root of the Dark Side anomaly remains unresolved, and the Academy is still uncertain of Fractsidus's reasoning for tampering with the Dark Side. Lucilla now looks to you to protect the Academy and uncover the mysteries. Meanwhile, a strange rabbit awaits you inside the Dark Side...

  • Duration: Permanently available after 2026-04-09 10:00 (server time)

  • Eligibility: Complete Main Quest Chapter III Act IV "Gold Suspended in Shadows" to unlock.

New Permanent Event: Whispers Between Stars

As the Main Quest progresses, unlock side storylines for some Resonators and spend more time with them. Complete tasks in these side storylines to win Astrites, Expedition Motorbike Livery: Memories of the Stars, and more.

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.2 update.

  • Eligibility: Solve the first riddle with Sigrika in Main Quest Chapter III Act IV "Gold Suspended in Shadows" to unlock.

New Events & Gameplay Features

[Special Events]

[Soar to the Beat] Rhythm Challenge Event

Lately, "Stellar Orbit Beats" has been taking the Mind Dive Arcade by storm! It's officially the go-to game for everyone to unwind and have fun here at the Academy. Got a free minute between classes? Grab your friends and let the rhythm carry you on a trip through the stars!

  • Duration: Version 3.2 Update - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

[Lahai-Roi Blocks] Leisure Event

Outside the Mind Dive Arcade, a student named Tetoris beckons you to try the latest "Game of the Year," Lahai-Roi Blocks. The game has many wondrous properties, or so she claims…

  • Duration: 2026-03-26 04:00 - 2026-04-13 03:59 (server time)

[Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project!] Leisure Event

At this year's Club Show & Tell, Van Tassie of the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society proudly unveils his latest project: the "F.U.E.L. Optimization Simulator." He claims this game will revolutionize the Academy's culinary experience by gathering the essential data. As is par for the course, your name is on the playtest roster. Yet, something about the project's core design seems... slightly off from the outset.

  • Duration: 2026-04-02 04:00 - 2026-04-20 03:59 (server time)

[Knights of the Wild] Featured Challenge Event

The Knights of the Wild, as people call them, are Mechascouts that roam the reaches of Lahai-Roi, sworn to protect those in peril. Now, for the first time, it is the Knights who call for aid.

  • Duration: 2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)

[The Flaming Red in Memory] Showcase Event

Platya, a Black Shores Bloom Bearer, has come to Startorch Academy chasing rumors of a Ghost Miko—whispers that seem to echo the legend of the "Lady Miko" of her distant homeland. Intrigued, you join her search.

  • Duration: 2026-04-16 04:00 - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)

[Gifts of Solsworn] 7-Day Login Event

During the event, log in to claim the day's login rewards from the event page.

  • Duration: Version 3.2 Update - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)

[New Gameplay Feature]

[Endstate Matrix] New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge

In Solaris's data space, invisible offenses and defenses occur every day. Before the malice inside the matrix annihilates everything, find it... and put an end to it.

  • Duration: From 2026-03-26 04:00 (server time)

The first Endstate Matrix Challenge Cycle (Doomsday Cycle) lasts from Version 3.2 to Version 3.4.

Limited-Time Only

Collab Livery Bundles

The following Expedition Motorbike Collab Livery bundles will be available in the Store: QUEEN and VIOLET.

Remember to check out the Vehicle Looks section of Outfits in the in-game Store for more details.

Availability: 2026-04-09 10:00 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

Other New Content

New "Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Hyvatia

New Sigils: Astral Flight, Past the Endstate - Doomsday Cycle

New Title: Matrix Ranger

New Expedition Motorbike Liveries: Memories of the Stars, Call from Beyond the Stars

Participate in Rhythm Challenge Event: Soar to the Beat to win Sigil: Astral Flight.

Participate in New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge: Endstate Matrix to win Expedition Motorbike Livery: Call from Beyond the Stars, Title: Matrix Ranger, and Sigil: Past the Endstate - Doomsday Cycle.

[Adjustments and Optimizations]

Features

**

Expedition Motorbike**

Optimized Autopilot Mode

  • Adjusted the obstacle-avoidance logic in Autopilot Mode to reduce wrong turns while driving.

  • Removed Adaptive Hook prompt in Autopilot Mode.

**

Material Tracking**

Optimized Material Acquisition Process

  • Selecting the "Tacet Discord" acquisition path after clicking on the icon of a specific Material via Backpack or the Resonators screen now opens the map and tracks Tacet Discords that drop the material within a certain radius of your current location.

  • If there are no such Tacet Discords within the radius or all such Tacet Discords have been defeated, Tacet Discords outside the radius will be automatically tracked.

Leveling

**

Echoes:**

Optimized Echo Filtering

  • Refined the filtering logic and made the relevant interfaces more intuitive; the upgraded Echo filtering function applies to Echo-related interfaces, including Echo Backpack and Data Bank.

  • Added Batch Discard and Batch Lock, allowing you to Batch Discard or Batch Lock the filtered results.

Optimized Echo Backpack Interface and Functionality

  • Added a quick access button for Data Merge on the Echo Backpack interface.

  • Added Smart Discard, allowing you to discard owned Echoes based on Suggested Plan or Custom Management Plan.

  • More well-founded pop-up suggestions based on the number of Echoes you own and the number of Echoes you've discarded; you will be prompted to either Data Merge or Smart Discard Echoes when your Echo Backpack is full.

**

Echo Management:**

Optimized Echo Management

  • Adjusted the underlying logic of Echo management; plans can now be edited based on Sonata Effect, and when a a new Echo is obtained, it will automatically be locked or marked for discard according to the Mainstats of the COST4/COST3/COST1 Echoes under each Sonata Effect.

  • Added the Suggested Plans feature, allowing you to import recommended management plans with one click.

  • Added the Manage Owned Echoes feature, allowing you to batch discard or lock owned Echoes according to enabled current plans.

  • Added the Sharing & Importing feature, allowing you to share your Echo configurations by means of a Plan Code or import other Rovers' Echo configurations using their Plan Codes.

  • Added the Auto-Discard Non-5-Star Echoes feature, which, when enabled, will automatically mark for discard all non-5-Star Echoes you own or will obtain.

  • When resetting your plans, you can choose "Disable Only" or "Clear Plans and Disable" for all the Echo Management plans.

**

Enhanced Absorption**

Adjusted Enhanced Absorption Criteria

  • After defeating a Tacet Discord, the base Echo drop rate will be considered first, and if an Echo is dropped on account of the base drop rate, no Enhanced Absorption attempt will be deducted.

  • Guaranteed Echo drops during quests do not cost any Enhanced Absorption attempt.

Challenges, Puzzles, & Events

**

Ascendant Aces (Resonator Trial Event)**

Optimized Reward Claiming

  • You can now claim the rewards for Resonators whose trials you've completed in a previous version after entering the event, without having to repeat the challenges.

  • All the trials you've completed before the release of Version 3.2 are valid.

  • You can still try out a Resonator in Ascendant Aces even if you've completed their trial in a previous version.

Controls

  • Optimized the experience of reversing the expedition motorbike on mobile; when reversing is triggered, the joystick control area for reversing will be temporarily expanded.

  • Optimized the experience of using Expedition Motorbike-related buttons during certain quests/challenges; custom key bindings for the motorbike will no longer conflict with the buttons involved in these quests/challenges.

UI

**

Red Dot Notification**

Adjusted Red Dot Notification

  • Added a red dot to the access button for the Hazard Revisited event on the Events - Recurring Event page.

  • Added cross-device synchronization of red notification dots for certain screens. When you remove red dots from such screens as Featured Event, Resonators, Guidebook, and Expedition Motorbike from one device, the red dots will no longer appear on other devices.

  • Adjusted red dot notification on the Expedition Motorbike - Motorbike Appearance screen. You no longer need to click on icons to remove red dots from the Chassis Mod, Livery, and Motorbike Accessory pages; instead, when you obtain new Motorbike cosmetics, animated graphics will be displayed for the unlocked Motorbike cosmetics upon entering the Motorbike Appearance screen, and the red dots will be removed automatically.

More feedback is being collected on cross-device synchronization of red notification dots. This feature will apply to more screens in future versions.

  • Adjusted the display on Weekly Challenge-related screens; the number of remaining weekly attempts allowed for claiming rewards is now displayed instead.

  • Adjusted UI display during cutscenes. When no input is detected 3 seconds into a cutscene, story-related buttons, such as Skip and Story Review, will be hidden until input is detected.

  • Optimized the display for when certain location icons are selected on the Roya Frostlands map. After the Version 3.2 update, selecting certain location icons, such as Soliskin locations, on the Roya Frostlands map will allow you to switch between different layers of the current map.

Graphics & Performance

**

PC Graphics**

Added Render Distance on PC

  • You can adjust Render Distance via Settings > Graphics > Render Distance. Three Render Distance settings are currently available: Default, Far, Farthest.

  • The Far and Farthest settings may contribute significantly to the device load. Please choose a suitable setting based on the performance of your device.

  • Added interaction effects to some Celebration Balloons on PC.

**

Mobile Graphics**

Added High Quality on Mobile

  • Added High Quality as a graphics quality option on mobile above Quality.

  • Enabling this option will increase the clarity of in-game visuals on mobile.

  • To enable the High Quality option, your graphics card must meet one of the following requirements:

  1. Snapdragon 8 Elite or newer, or Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 or newer

  2. MediaTek Dimensity 9400 or newer

  3. XRing O1

After the Version 3.2 update, all mobile devices that support High Quality will have their default in-game resolution increased to some extent.

Due to variations in the in-game settings and system environment, enabling the option may occasionally cause performance issues, in-game glitches, and hardware-related issues. If you encounter any issue, please try switching to a lower setting. If the issue persists, please contact customer support for further assistance.

**

Graphics Settings**

Added Previews for Graphics Settings

  • A new button has been added to the right of certain graphics settings; click on it to view a text description of the effects that will be applied after enabling the setting.

  • A new button has been added to the right of certain graphics settings; click on it to bring up a visual preview of the effects that will be applied after enabling the setting.

Please note: The preview content is for demonstration purposes only; the actual in-game effects may vary to some extent from the previews shown.

※Bug Fix Notice Regarding Certain Devices:

  1. The colors of the game might fail to display properly on PCs equipped with RX 9000 series GPUs running on specific driver versions and with Ray Tracing - Global Illumination enabled. The manufacturer has resolved this issue. If you encounter this issue, please try updating your driver version to 26.2.2. Additionally, access to Ray Tracing - Global Illumination will be reopened with the release of Version 3.2 for these devices.

  2. Character models might fail to load properly on iQOO 15 mobile devices running on specific system versions. The manufacturer has resolved this issue. If you encounter this issue, please check to see if the issue remains in Version 3.2.

Audio

  • Optimized some audio/stereo effects.

Other

**

Beta Feature**

Added "Resource Cleanup" on PC and Mac

  • Resource Cleanup allows you to delete the cutscenes that you have watched and are saved in your current game account. You can check the size of the saved cutscenes via Settings > Other > Resource Cleanup and delete them.

With the Version 3.2 update, approximately 10GB of additional game resources will be downloaded upon launching the game. This increase in download size is due to optimizations and adjustments made to the existing game resource structure. Once the download is complete, the restructuring of the game client's resources will be finalized. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may experience in the meantime. Thank you for your support for Wuthering Waves.

This feature is at the testing stage and is subject to changes.

  • Optimized the descriptions of certain in-game settings and functions.

[Bug Fixes]

**

Resonators & Weapons**

  • Fixed an issue where Resonator Luuk Herssen's character model might behave abnormally when certain Idle Animations were displayed.

  • Fixed an issue where Resonator Luuk Herssen's character model might behave abnormally on the Resonators screen.

  • Fixed an issue where the camera shot was pulled in close when Resonator Aemeath cast Resonance Skill - Form Switch to switch from Mech form to herself.

  • Fixed an issue where the model of Resonator Aemeath's weapon might behave abnormally after performing Dodge Counter.

  • Fixed an issue where certain skill SFX icons failed to display properly when Resonator Aemeath was in mech form.

  • Fixed an issue where using Hoverdroid: Shooter did not remove the effects of Optic Camo Resonator Lynae placed on herself.

  • Fixed an issue where Resonator Lynae's Character Stories contained textual errors.

  • Fixed an issue where the lighting in the animation for Resonator Iuno's Resonance Liberation "Beneath Lunar Tides" failed to display properly.

**

Enemies & Echoes**

  • Fixed an issue where the rewards for defeating the enemy "Nameless Explorer" could not be claimed under certain circumstances.

**

Features**

  • Fixed an issue where red dots could not be removed from the Pioneer Podcast interface in some situations.

  • Fixed an issue where opening "Synthesis" might render the current screen unresponsive.

  • Fixed an issue where certain player actions could cause the Resonance Mode Switch icon on the Resonators page to disappear.

  • Fixed an issue where accessing a Forgery Challenge domain via Guidebook > Forgery Challenge did not automatically select the domain on the map.

  • Fixed an issue where incorrect Dish Types were given for certain dishes in the Culinary Station of the "Roya Frostlands - Startorch Academy" area.

  • Fixed an issue where DLSS could not be enabled on some laptops that met the requirements.

  • Fixed an issue where the 120 FPS option could not be enabled on some PCs that met the requirements.

  • Fixed an issue where the 120 FPS option could not be enabled on some iPads equipped with M5 chips.

  • Resolved some known issues that caused the game to crash on iOS.

**

Challenges, Puzzles, & Events**

  • Fixed an issue in "Somnium Labyrinth - Rift Runner" where pressing the Go button sometimes failed to jump to the corresponding stage.

  • Fixed an issue in the "Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways" event where certain player actions could make it impossible to exit the lineup page after entering it using a controller.

  • Fixed an issue in Co-op Mode where the time on the countdown after completing a Tacet Field challenge was abnormal.

  • Fixed an issue where the corresponding task was still marked with "Go" on the Activity panel after Fallen Grave Nightmare Nest was cleared.

  • Fixed an issue where certain player actions could make it impossible to obtain Musicfly in the "Rinascita - Vault Underground" area.

  • Fixed an issue in Soliskin Guide where pressing Shoot while Resonator Aemeath was in mech form could cause the mech to rise.

  • Fixed an issue in Induction Cell & Cell Socket where certain player actions could prevent interaction with some Induction Cells through Levitator.

**

Quests**

  • Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression in Main Quest "The Star That Voyages Far" where the Resonator could sink below the surface while in the Ginnungamere cabin. If you encounter this issue after the Version 3.2 update, please restart the game to resolve it.

  • Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression where toggling between Main Quest "The Star That Voyages Far" and Main Quests from previous versions occurred unexpectedly.

  • Fixed an issue in Main Quest "What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing" where Carlotta's character model behaved abnormally during the objective "Search for the mysterious girl in the crowd."

  • Fixed an issue in Main Quest "By Moon's Fated Light" where certain player actions could cause the current Resonator to sink below the surface upon opening the secret door during the objective "Investigate the area behind the secret door.

  • Fixed an issue in Companion Story "Forking Paths Among the Stars" where Rover's character model, while wearing the Outfit "Perpetual Spark," sometimes behaved abnormally.

  • Fixed an issue where certain visual assets in "Roya Frostlands - Giant's Gaze - Spacetrek Observatory" failed to display properly after completing Exploration Quest "Operation: Frontier Renewal."

  • Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression in Side Quest "Treasures in the Painting" where the next quest objective did not appear upon reaching the target location using Resonator Aemeath in Mech form.

  • Fixed an issue in Side Quest "Moments Captured in Light" where NPC models sometimes behaved abnormally while the photo was being taken during the objective "Take a photo of B.1.N.G.O. and two freshmen."

**

Environment**

  • Fixed an issue where the skies failed to display properly in certain parts of the "Roya Frostlands - Mount Gjallar" area.

  • Fixed an issue where certain NPC models in the "Roya Frostlands - Startorch Academy" area behaved abnormally.

  • Fixed an issue where the snowfield failed to display properly in certain parts of the Roya Frostlands area.

  • Fixed an issue where the lighting in certain Honami City scenes failed to display properly.

  • Resolved known instances of objects or NPCs floating above the surface.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event Winners Reveal
entry.content:
Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "For You Who Walk in Snow" has concluded, and we want to express our heartfelt appreciation to all participants for their dedication and creativity in our fan art event. Let's view the winning entries and their contributors!

entry.title: Resonator Review | Bambooscape — Qiuyuan
entry.content:
Resonator Review | Bambooscape — Qiuyuan

Former senior agent of Mingting's Internal Security Agency.

Though enmity filled his younger days, loyalty defined his later years. However, scapegoated for a murder, he is now but a blind swordsman wandering the world alone.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Update Content | Version 3.2 "Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows" Planned for Release on March 19th (UTC+8)
Profile Reveal | True Name Manifestation — Sigrika
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Sigrika

Sigrika, a student of Startorch Academy and a Resonator of Royan Runes.

Determined to live up to others' expectations and become a true Solsworn, she devotes herself fully to every challenge.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version 3.2 Update Maintenance Notice
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

To bring you exciting new content and a better gaming experience, we will soon be conducting the update maintenance for Version 3.2: Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows.

During the maintenance, you will be unable to log in to the game, so please plan your time accordingly. Additionally, due to the large size of the update, we recommend updating the game while connected to a Wi-Fi network. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]

✦Maintenance Time: 2026-03-19 04:00 - 2026-03-19 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-03-19 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.

[How to Update]

Once the maintenance for the version update begins, you can follow the following instructions to update your client.

  • PC: Close the game, restart the launcher, and then click on "Update."

  • Android: Launch the game and follow the instructions in the update pop-up window to complete the update.

  • iOS: Download/update the game in the App Store.

  • Mac: Download/update the game in the App Store.

  • PS5™: Open the home screen > Select Wuthering Waves > Press the OPTIONS button to Check for Update

[Pre-download]

✦Pre-download Start Time: 2026-03-17 10:00 (UTC+8)

We will be optimizing the performance of the pre-download feature on mobile. Consequently, the pre-download feature will only be available on PC for Version 3.2. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may experience. Thank you for your support for Wuthering Waves.

Pre-download Storage Requirements

✦PC: 19 GB. To ensure smoother subsequent processes, such as decompressing, it is recommended that you have at least 28 GB of spare storage space on your PC.

Please note that pre-download may not be possible if your device does not have enough spare storage space.

[How to Pre-download]

✦PC: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, "New Version Pre-download" appears below the "Start" button on the launcher interface. Select this option to pre-download the resources.

You can continue playing the game while the pre-downloading process is ongoing. The process can be paused at any time. Whether it is complete or not, the update maintenance will speed up to a certain degree when initiated.

Please ensure that you have a stable network connection during the pre-downloading process.

[Version 3.2 Preview]

[New Resonator]

5-Star Resonator: Sigrika (Aero/Gauntlets)

※Obtainable through the [When the Runes Glitter] Featured Resonator Convene.

[New Weapon]

5-Star Weapon: Solsworn Ciphers (Gauntlets)

※Obtainable through the [Solsworn Ciphers] Featured Weapon Convene.

[New Enemies]

Phagosite: Bipolarch, Phagosite: Hysterarch, Phagosite: Miserarch, Fractsidus Milliner, Fractsidus Mawdoll, Fractsidus Ripper

[New Stories]

Main Quest Chapter III Act IV: Gold Suspended in Shadows

Segue - Afterstory: Rabbit Reflected in Shades

New Permanent Event: Whispers Between Stars

As the Main Quest progresses, unlock side storylines for some Resonators and spend more time with them. Complete tasks in these side storylines to win Astrites, Expedition Motorbike Livery: Memories of the Stars, and more.

[Utility: Expedition Motorbike]

Optimized obstacle-avoidance logic in Autopilot Mode

Optimized chassis adaptability

[Gameplay Optimizations]

Optimized Echo Management

- Echo Management plans can be arranged based on Sonata Effect.

- Echo management plans can now be shared and imported.

[Other Optimizations]

Added the "High Quality" option in the graphics settings on Mobile.

Added the "Render Distance" option in the graphics settings on PC.

[Other New Content]

New "Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Hyvatia

New Sigils: Astral Flight, Past the Endstate: Doomsday Cycle

New Title: Matrix Ranger

Expedition Motorbike Liveries: Memories of the Stars, Call from Beyond the Stars

※Participate in Rhythm Challenge Event: Soar to the Beat to win Sigil: Astral Flight.

※Participate in New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge: Endstate Matrix to win Expedition Motorbike Livery: Call from Beyond the Stars, Title: Matrix Ranger, and Sigil: Past the Endstate: Doomsday Cycle.

[Special Events]

[Soar to the Beat] Rhythm Challenge Event

[Lahai-Roi Blocks] Leisure Event

[Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project!] Leisure Event

[Knights of the Wild] Featured Challenge Event

[The Flaming Red in Memory] Showcase Event

[Gifts of Solsworn] 7-Day Login Event

[New Permanent Event]

[Endstate Matrix] New High Difficulty Recurring Challenge

※For more details on the new content, optimizations, and bug fixes coming to the game in Version 3.2, please stay tuned for the upcoming release notes.

[Device Requirements]

To ensure a smooth experience, please refer to the following requirements:

  1. Minimum

Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 835, MediaTek G71/72 or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more

iOS: [System] iOS 14 or later; [Model] iPhone 11 or newer, iPad with A13 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more

Mac: [System] macOS 12.0 or later; [Model] m1 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more

PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I5 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 2700; [GPU] Geforce 1060/RX570/Intel ARC A380, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Recommended

Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 8 Gen1+/Gen2/Gen3 or MediaTek processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more

iOS: [System] iOS 15 or later; [Model] iPhone 13 or newer, iPad with A15 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more

Mac: [System] macOS 15.0 or later; [Model] m3 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more

PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I7 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 3700, [GPU] Geforce 2060/RX5700XT/Intel ARC A750; [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Required Storage Space

Android/iOS: 60 GB

Mac: 130 GB

PC: 130 GB; it's recommended to install the game on an SSD.

PS5™: Please make sure your device has sufficient available storage to complete the update successfully.

  1. Controller Support

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mobile.

Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mac.

Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on PC.

Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wired Controllers: DualShock®4

When you connect any other controller that supports multiple input modes to a PC, it is recommended that you set the controller to XInput mode for the best experience.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Stars Intertwined | Sigrika
entry.content: "Hi, I'm Sigrika! Want to understand the meaning of runes? Need a hand with something? Then I'm the one to ask!"—Sigrika

entry.title: High Difficulty Recurring Challenge: Endstate Matrix, Coming in Version 3.2!
entry.content: Endstate Matrix progresses through Challenge Cycles. Each Challenge Cycle spans across multiple Challenge Phases. Get a sneak peek now!

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version Preview | Version 3.2 "Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows" Scheduled for Release on March 19th (UTC+8)
entry.content: The Preview Special Broadcast has concluded. Take a look back at all these exciting updates:

entry.title: [Chord Cleansing] Limited-Time Echo Double Drop Event
entry.content:
The Tacet Fields are experiencing a surge in energy due to the Waveworn Phenomenon.

Use the Waveplates to maximize your rewards from the Tacetite Blooms!

Duration

2026-03-11 04:00 - 2026-03-18 03:59 (server time)

Eligibility

Reach Union Level 19.

Details

  • Complete Tacet Suppression challenges during the event and spend Waveplates for double rewards.

  • During [Chord Cleansing], you can claim double rewards 3 times a day, and the remaining double rewards claims can be viewed on the [Chord Cleansing] event page.

  • During [Chord Cleansing], double rewards claims refresh daily at 04:00 (server time).

entry.title: [Lollo Campaign: Implementation] Featured Commission Event
entry.content:
The Lollo Campaign has encountered yet another crisis! To save Maji's career, and to keep those extra bucks flowing in, help him complete his new program, Lollo Springtime!

Complete the campaigns to claim your Lollo Stamps—a gift of gratitude from Lollo Logistics. Lollo Stamps can be exchanged for Lollo Helper special deliveries.

Duration

2026-03-05 04:00 - 2026-03-18 03:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x400, Lustrous Tide x5, Premium Tuner x40, Premium Enclosure Tank - Lahai-Roi x5, Forgery Premium Supply - Lahai-Roi x10, Crystal Solvent x5, Shell Credit x340000, and other Materials.

Eligibility

Reach Union Level 14 and activate the Resonance Nexus of the Startorch Academy during Main Quest Chapter III Act I ""What Burns Beneath Frostlands"" to unlock.

Event Rules

  • During the event, you can complete Lollo Campaigns to obtain a set number of Lollo Stamps.

  • Each Lollo Stamp can be exchanged for a Lollo Helper special delivery.

  • There are 3 Inventories for the Lollo Helper special deliveries. Once you collect all deliveries in an Inventory, the next Inventory will be unlocked.

  • If you win the Lollo Express special delivery service, you can claim all deliveries in the current Inventory.

After the event ends, the unfinished Lollo Campaigns will not be available, and all the remaining Lollo Stamps will be recycled.

entry.title: [Lux & Umbra] Featured Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Lux & Umbra, 4-Star Weapons: Hollow Mirage, Jinzhou Keeper, and Overture receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-02-26 10:00 - 2026-03-18 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Lux & Umbra.

  • Featured Weapon Lux & Umbra is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [From Ashes] Featured Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Galbrena, 4-Star Resonators: Sanhua, Lumi, and Yuanwu receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-02-26 10:00 - 2026-03-18 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [From Ashes] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Galbrena is exclusive to the [From Ashes] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Galbrena's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Daybreaker's Spine] Featured Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Daybreaker's Spine, 4-Star Weapons: Hollow Mirage, Jinzhou Keeper, and Overture receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-02-26 10:00 - 2026-03-18 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Daybreaker's Spine.

  • Featured Weapon Daybreaker's Spine is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [When Winter Thaws] Featured Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Luuk Herssen, 4-Star Resonators: Sanhua, Lumi, and Yuanwu receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-02-26 10:00 - 2026-03-18 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [When Winter Thaws] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Luuk Herssen is exclusive to the [When Winter Thaws] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Luuk Herssen's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Infernal Descent—Galbrena
entry.content:
Resonator Review | Infernal Descent—Galbrena

Cold and decisive, she is the "Discord Slayer" who hunts across Solaris and the same "Fiend of Ever-burning Flame" spoken of in whispers. Now, she serves as a Black Shores Consultant, active across the world.
